title: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * AIDS/HIV Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Health/Disability Related Support Groups * AIDS/HIV Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Amputations Autism Spectrum Disorder Blindness Deafness Hard of Hearing Parkinson's Disease AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups for people living with HIV and their families with group meetings, food, activities, and referrals to community resources. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families Hours: Call for current schedule Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE SUPPORT GROUPS
